parameters.query:
WITH available_terms AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM trade_terminals
  WHERE (metadata->>'is_available')::int = 1
),
primary_terms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (name) *
  FROM available_terms
  ORDER BY name,
    CASE terminal_type
      WHEN 'item'          THEN 1
      WHEN 'commodity'     THEN 2
      WHEN 'vehicle_buy'   THEN 3
      WHEN 'vehicle_rent'  THEN 4
      WHEN 'fuel'          THEN 5
      WHEN 'refinery'      THEN 6
      WHEN 'commodity_raw' THEN 7
      ELSE 8
    END,
    source_id
),
name_meta AS (
  SELECT
    name,
    jsonb_agg(DISTINCT terminal_type ORDER BY terminal_type) AS all_types,
    jsonb_agg(DISTINCT source_id     ORDER BY source_id)     AS all_source_ids
  FROM available_terms
  GROUP BY name
),
item_price_data AS (
  SELECT
    tt.name,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'item_name',    p.asset_name,
        'item_uex_id',  p.item_external_id,
        'item_uuid',    p.item_uuid,
        'buy_price',    p.buy_price,
        'sell_price',   p.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY p.asset_name
    ) FILTER (WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL) AS item_prices
  FROM prices p
  JOIN available_terms tt ON tt.source_id = concat('terminals:', p.uex_terminal_id::text)
  WHERE p.asset_type = 'item'
  GROUP BY tt.name
),
commodity_price_data AS (
  SELECT
    tt.name,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'commodity_name',    p.asset_name,
        'commodity_uex_id',  p.uex_commodity_id,
        'buy_price',         p.buy_price,
        'sell_price',        p.sell_price
      ) ORDER BY p.asset_name
    ) FILTER (WHERE p.id IS NOT NULL) AS commodity_prices
  FROM prices p
  JOIN available_terms tt ON tt.source_id = concat('terminals:', p.uex_terminal_id::text)
  WHERE p.asset_type = 'commodity'
  GROUP BY tt.name
),
datap4k_data AS (
  SELECT
    tt.name,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'class_name',    si.class_name,
        'category',      si.category,
        'buy_auec',      si.buy_auec,
        'sell_auec',     si.sell_auec,
        'shop',          si.shop,
        'location',      si.location
      ) ORDER BY si.category, si.class_name
    ) FILTER (WHERE si.id IS NOT NULL) AS dp4k_inventory
  FROM datap4k_shop_inventory si
  JOIN available_terms tt ON tt.source_id = si.terminal_source_id
  GROUP BY tt.name
),
location_ctx AS (
  SELECT
    pt.name AS terminal_name,
    l.name  AS location_name,
    l.location_type,
    b.name  AS body_name,
    b.body_type,
    s.name  AS system_name,
    s.metadata->>'code' AS system_code
  FROM primary_terms pt
  JOIN locations l ON l.id = pt.location_id
  LEFT JOIN bodies b ON b.id = l.body_id
  LEFT JOIN systems s ON s.id = l.system_id
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(pt.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))),
  'terminal',
  pt.name,
  NULL,
  pt.terminal_type,
  split_part(pt.source_id, ':', 2)::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',              pt.name,
    'terminal_type',     pt.terminal_type,
    'all_types',         nm.all_types,
    'source_id',         pt.source_id,
    'all_source_ids',    nm.all_source_ids,
    'code',              pt.metadata->>'code',
    'fullname',          pt.metadata->>'fullname',
    'displayname',       pt.metadata->>'displayname',
    'nickname',          pt.metadata->>'nickname',
    'screenshot',        pt.metadata->>'screenshot',
    'screenshot_full',   pt.metadata->>'screenshot_full',
    'screenshot_author', pt.metadata->>'screenshot_author',
    'contact_url',       pt.metadata->>'contact_url',
    'game_version',      pt.metadata->>'game_version',
    'company_name',      pt.metadata->>'company_name',
    'faction_name',      pt.metadata->>'faction_name',
    'id_company',        (pt.metadata->>'id_company')::integer,
    'id_faction',        (pt.metadata->>'id_faction')::integer,
    'max_container_size', (pt.metadata->>'max_container_size')::integer,
    'orbit_name',         pt.metadata->>'orbit_name',
    'planet_name',        pt.metadata->>'planet_name',
    'moon_name',          pt.metadata->>'moon_name',
    'space_station_name', pt.metadata->>'space_station_name',
    'outpost_name',       pt.metadata->>'outpost_name',
    'city_name',          pt.metadata->>'city_name',
    'star_system_name',   pt.metadata->>'star_system_name',
    'location_name',      COALESCE(lc.location_name, pt.metadata->>'space_station_name', pt.metadata->>'outpost_name', pt.metadata->>'city_name'),
    'location_type',      lc.location_type,
    'body_name',          lc.body_name,
    'body_type',          lc.body_type,
    'system_name',        COALESCE(lc.system_name, pt.metadata->>'star_system_name'),
    'system_code',        COALESCE(lc.system_code, ''),
    'services', jsonb_build_object(
      'is_shop_fps',              (pt.metadata->>'is_shop_fps')::boolean,
      'is_shop_vehicle',          (pt.metadata->>'is_shop_vehicle')::boolean,
      'is_refinery',              (pt.metadata->>'is_refinery')::boolean,
      'is_refuel',                (pt.metadata->>'is_refuel')::boolean,
      'is_repair',                (pt.metadata->>'is_repair')::boolean,
      'is_medical',               (pt.metadata->>'is_medical')::boolean,
      'is_food',                  (pt.metadata->>'is_food')::boolean,
      'is_habitation',            (pt.metadata->>'is_habitation')::boolean,
      'is_cargo_center',          (pt.metadata->>'is_cargo_center')::boolean,
      'has_docking_port',         (pt.metadata->>'has_docking_port')::boolean,
      'has_loading_dock',         (pt.metadata->>'has_loading_dock')::boolean,
      'has_freight_elevator',     (pt.metadata->>'has_freight_elevator')::boolean,
      'is_auto_load',             (pt.metadata->>'is_auto_load')::boolean,
      'is_nqa',                   (pt.metadata->>'is_nqa')::boolean,
      'is_player_owned',          (pt.metadata->>'is_player_owned')::boolean,
      'is_affinity_influenceable',(pt.metadata->>'is_affinity_influenceable')::boolean,
      'max_container_size',       (pt.metadata->>'max_container_size')::integer
    ),
    'flags', jsonb_build_object(
      'is_available',      (pt.metadata->>'is_available')::boolean,
      'is_available_live', (pt.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
      'is_visible',        (pt.metadata->>'is_visible')::boolean,
      'is_jump_point',     (pt.metadata->>'is_jump_point')::boolean,
      'is_default_system', (pt.metadata->>'is_default_system')::boolean
    ),
    'metadata',           pt.metadata,
    'item_prices',        COALESCE(ip.item_prices,        '[]'::jsonb),
    'commodity_prices',   COALESCE(cp.commodity_prices,   '[]'::jsonb),
    'datap4k_shops',      COALESCE(dp.dp4k_inventory,     '[]'::jsonb),
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(pt.name, '')                       || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'displayname', '')   || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'nickname', '')      || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'star_system_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'planet_name', '')   || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'moon_name', '')     || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'space_station_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.metadata->>'faction_name', '')  || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(pt.terminal_type, '')
  ),
  now()
FROM primary_terms pt
JOIN name_meta nm ON nm.name = pt.name
LEFT JOIN item_price_data ip ON ip.name = pt.name
LEFT JOIN commodity_price_data cp ON cp.name = pt.name
LEFT JOIN datap4k_data dp ON dp.name = pt.name
LEFT JOIN location_ctx lc ON lc.terminal_name = pt.name
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = 'terminal'
  AND esc.uex_slug = trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(pt.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g')))
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
